title: FirePilot Rulebase Manifest
description: JSON Schema for _rulebase.yaml files (ADR-0007). Validates the ordering manifest for a folder/position combination. Every entry in rule_order must have a corresponding {name}.yaml file in the same directory — this bidirectional consistency is enforced by OPA (Gate 2), not this schema.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this revision of the FirePilot configuration schema.

folder.description: SCM folder name. Must match the parent directory name exactly. OPA enforces this structural invariant (Gate 2).

position.description: Position in the rulebase: 'pre' (before default rules) or 'post' (after default rules). Must match the containing directory name. OPA enforces this structural invariant (Gate 2).

rule_order.description: Ordered list of rule names (without .yaml extension). Each entry must correspond to a {name}.yaml file in the same directory. No duplicates permitted. Ordering determines firewall rule evaluation sequence (first-match model). Bidirectional consistency with actual files is enforced by OPA (Gate 2).
